title: ACT Runtime — error envelope (4xx/5xx body)
description: Re-emitted from PRD-100 for self-containment. PRD-100 owns the canonical definition; PRD-106 cites this shape verbatim. The `code` enum is closed; adding a value is a MAJOR change per PRD-108.

act_version.description: Per PRD-108-R1, present on every envelope including error envelopes.

code.description: Closed enum per gap A4 / PRD-100. Adding a value is a MAJOR change per PRD-108-R5(4).

message.description: Human-readable. MUST NOT carry PII or auth-scoped identifiers (PRD-109).

details.description: Optional, code-specific, stable shape per code. Producers MUST NOT embed request bodies, identity material, or other auth-scoped information.
